mapper.select: select id, type, name, icon, creator_type, creator_id from facility_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select facility_id from room_facility where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
select id, type, name, icon from facility_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select facility_id from apartment_facility where is_deleted = 0 and apartment_id = #{id})

SELECT id, type, name, icon, creator_type as creatorType, creator_id as creatorId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM facility_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (creator_type = 1 OR (creator_type = 2 AND creator_id = #{landlordId})) ORDER BY creator_type ASC, name ASC

SELECT fi.id, fi.type, fi.name, fi.icon, fi.creator_type as creatorType, fi.creator_id as creatorId, fi.create_time as createTime, fi.update_time as updateTime FROM apartment_facility af INNER JOIN facility_info fi ON af.facility_id = fi.id WHERE af.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} AND af.is_deleted = 0 AND fi.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY fi.name ASC
